name: list_automations
description: List Cursor Automations product entries visible to the current user. Use only when the user explicitly asks about Cursor Automations. Returns compact summaries and only searches fields included in those summaries.

query.description: Optional search text matched only against returned Cursor Automations list fields, such as automation ID, trigger/action types, scope, enabled state, URL, and timestamps.

teamId.description: Optional numeric team id used to scope team-visible automations.

includeDisabled.description: When true, disabled automations are included. Omitted or false returns only enabled automations.
